title: LCE Potion bar - Modernized
description: Brings Back The Old Legacy Console Edition Potion Bar But In A More Modern Style.
body:
# LCE Potion Bar - Modernized (LPBM)

LPBM Brings the old legacy console edition potion bars which show the stats of the potion on the icon but in an improved and modern style.

**Potion Bars & Types:**

![LPBM Potion Types Within A Shulker, Displaying All Possible Types.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0430c157b4891ca479680165fb278555d1db7ae4.png)

All Potions That Give An Effect Will Have A Blue Section of the bar,
Next To That Blue Section Is A Secondary Area:
- If it's Empty, The potion has no modifers placed on it.
- If It's Red, The potion has been extended with redstone.
- If It's Yellow, The potion has been amplified with glowstone.

[The following do not show the blue bar.]

- If It's purple, it does not give any effect.
- If It's orange, it means the potion is either custom, or unknown. (you may see this if you use unobtainable potions.)

The Bars Will Only Display Within The UI.
